steps.title: Find the base width
steps.content:
The base area is length times width. Let the width be $w$.
$$
18t=\frac{3}{2}w
$$
$$
w=18t\cdot\frac{2}{3}=12t
$$

steps.title: Add all face areas
steps.content:
For a rectangular prism, surface area is
$$
SA=2lw+2lh+2wh
$$
Substitute $l=\frac{3}{2}$, $w=12t$, and $h=10$.
$$
2lw=2(18t)=36t
$$
$$
2lh=2\bigl(\frac{3}{2}\bigr)(10)=30
$$
$$
2wh=2(12t)(10)=240t
$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Add the three pairs of faces. $$ SA=36t+30+240t=276t+30 $$ The answer is B.
